blended.narrative: Bretton Woods is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,975 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
